name: Rattan Kids' Daybed - Pillowfort™
description: Set up your kid's new space or revamp the existing one with the Rattan Kids' Daybed from Pillowfort™. This kid's platform-style daybed is designed with a rattan woven design and curved back for artisanal appeal. In a neutral shade, this daybed easily integrates into any decor style or color scheme. Simply add a mattress and you're ready to go, no box spring required.
